---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did you prefer this one?

## Relevant Roadmap Phase

Which roadmap phase does this relate to? (Phase 1, 2, 3...)

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or links that help explain the feature.
